title: Technical Competency Progress Tracker Record v1.11 (v1.11 rev 2, 2026-07-14)

enum: Variable versus value versus type distinction
Runtime validation versus static type checking
Git branch and pull request workflow
Ordering constraint for buy before sell
Retrieval intent versus corpus vocabulary mapping
Business decision to analytical question translation
Outlier removal versus rare valid signal
Operational database versus warehouse versus lake
Single source of truth for shared UI state
Local state versus context versus state library
Effect dependency and stale closure behavior
Memoization as performance hint not correctness guarantee
API request loading success error states
Idempotency key and stale version handling
Foreign key constraint versus ID column
Inner join versus left join row preservation
Configured CI gates versus business correctness

Container health checks and restart diagnosis

Spring API boundary versus framework-owned concept
Semantic layer versus raw query modeling
Dashboard versus ad hoc analysis boundary
Aggregate versus row-level calculation in BI tools
Self-serve dashboard versus analyst-gated report boundary

loggingMode.description: fast = assessmentId/date/task, three level scores, finalScore (uniform 0-100, never omitted), answerLevel, qualifyingDemonstratedLevel, gates, weaknessTags/knowledgeGapTags, taskType, difficulty, assistanceLevel. full = complete diagnostic layer. Default assumed 'full' if omitted for backward compatibility with pre-v1.11 records. Supersedes the deprecated quickLog boolean (quickLog:true maps to 'fast').

gapClosureStatus.description: Gap lifecycle. Soft-open default (rev 2): if gapTypes or knowledgeGapTags are present and this object is omitted, the importing tracker opens the gap automatically ({status:'open', openedDate:<record date>, retestRequired:true}). Emit explicitly when a different status is intended.

graderModel.description: Exact model id that produced an AI grade (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-5'). Required when evaluatorType is 'AI grader'; omit/null for manual grades. The tracker's grader-provenance filter audits by this field.

finalScore.description: Uniform final grade 0-100 (rev 2: REQUIRED in every record, including loggingMode 'fast'). Importers that receive a record without it compute rawScore - penalties (capped), which silently evaluates to 0 when the supporting scores were also omitted and poisons averages, pass rates, and histograms. Always emit explicitly.

universalScore.description: Universal competency total (sum of the six universalSubScores). Required in full mode.

taskSpecificScore.description: Task-specific rubric total. Required in full mode.

cap.description: Score cap per section 13; null = no cap.

answerLevel.description: Highest level whose score passes its standard. Use 'L1'/'L2'/'L3' (or 'Below Level I'). The tracker's role-level matrix counts only 'L1'/'L2'/'L3'.

qualifyingDemonstratedLevel.description: Answer level capped by problem level, difficulty evidence, and autonomy. Use 'L1'/'L2'/'L3' (or 'Below Level I').

evidenceClass.description: Evidence class ids per section 10: prospective controlled, Class A strong retrospective, Class B partial retrospective, Class C anecdotal.

primaryRole.description: Primary role competency axis. The tracker's role-level matrix and role filters key on this.
